commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=421f9f09bb439a2954619b842948380cfb199ed6)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Slack unknown final-send reconciliation through the message adapter, exports the Slack send reconciler, adjusts inherited Slack SecretRef diagnostic paths, and adds focused Slack regression tests.

PR surface: Source +185, Tests +171. Total +356 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level for the PR defects: delayed recovery searches through later same-text Slack traffic, and formatted finals are compared before Slack mrkdwn conversion. I did not run a live Slack reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The blockers are concrete, but missing contributor-provided real Slack proof keeps this human-only rather than a ClawSweeper repair-lane candidate.

target.title: [codex] Reconcile unknown Slack final sends before replay
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves
Slack delivery can land in an unknown final-send state: the message may have been posted, but the local sender cannot prove it before replay logic runs. Without reconciliation, Red can replay the same final answer and duplicate a Slack response after an uncertain send result.

## Summary
- Reconcile previously unknown Slack final sends before replaying a response.
- Persist default Slack send identity per account/channel and match normalized final text during replay checks.
- Add regression coverage for Slack send reconciliation, channel message handling, and account default identity behavior.

## Evidence
- Local focused Slack test pass: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-slack.config.ts extensions/slack/src/accounts.test.ts extensions/slack/src/send.reconcile.test.ts extensions/slack/src/channel.message-adapter.test.ts`
- Local extension typecheck pass: `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- Local extension test typecheck pass: `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test`
- Draft PR check evidence before body update: code-adjacent checks passed; only `Real behavior proof` failed because this external PR body lacked the required authored sections.
target.author: joeyfrasier
